description_long: This object is a half-loaf of rustic bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a roughly oval shape. The surface is uneven, with visible cracks and a slightly flour-dusted appearance, suggesting a hand-formed, artisanal style. One side displays a flat, cut surface, revealing a dense, slightly porous interior typical of traditional loaves. The crust is matte and rough, with some darker baked areas and a few lighter patches. There is a handwritten label in black ink on the crust, indicating cataloging or identification, possibly for a collection or display. The bread appears solid and compact, with no visible packaging or additional components.
description: A rustic, oval half-loaf of bread with a thick, cracked golden-brown crust and a dense, cut interior. The surface is rough and matte, with a handwritten label on one side.
description_view_0: The flat, cut side of the bread is visible, showing the dense interior and a handwritten label on the crust.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rounded, domed crust with visible cracks and a rough, matte texture.
description_view_2: The back of the bread shows the full curvature of the crust, with subtle color variations and no visible labeling.
description_view_3: A side view emphasizing the thick crust, deep cracks, and the transition from the domed top to the cut base.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and uneven, with prominent cracks and a rough, rustic texture. There is no visible scoring or decorative flour dusting, giving it a natural, hand-formed appearance.
